name: qa-command-center
description: A portable Claude Code plugin providing structured QA workflows: test case generation, bug reporting, code review, flaky test detection, and automated quality hooks.
author: Emre Aman

commands.name: bug-report
commands.description: Interactive ISTQB-compliant bug report creation — asks six questions one at a time and writes a formatted report to tests/bugs/

commands.name: new-test
commands.description: Interactive manual test case creation — collects feature, steps, and expected outcome, then writes to tests/manual/

commands.name: new-method
commands.description: Interactive utility method generator — collects name, language, signature, error handling, and edge cases, then generates code and optional unit tests

skills.name: test-generator
skills.description: ISTQB boundary-value analysis and equivalence partitioning technique for generating comprehensive test suites

skills.name: qa-review
skills.description: Structured QA review across six categories: missing validation, error handling, user messages, confirmation dialogs, accessibility, and edge cases

skills.name: bug-report-generator
skills.description: Converts raw tester notes, logs, or unstructured descriptions into professional submission-ready bug reports

agents.name: test-writer
agents.description: Generates comprehensive, coverage-complete test suites from any feature description, user story, or API contract

agents.name: bug-reporter
agents.description: Guides structured defect documentation via a conversational interview; delegates formatting to the bug-report command

agents.name: qa-reviewer
agents.description: Reviews code changes, features, PRs, and architecture plans from a QA perspective; outputs findings grouped by severity

agents.name: flake-analyzer
agents.description: Diagnoses flaky tests by analyzing pass/fail history patterns and failure notes; returns a single root-cause hypothesis

hooks.name: check-response-shape
hooks.description: Warns when a server/routes/*.js file may return a response missing the required {success, data, error} envelope

hooks.name: check-severity-enum
hooks.description: Warns when non-standard severity strings ('high', 'medium', 'low', 'blocker', 'cosmetic') appear as literals in JS/JSX files

hooks.name: check-js-build
hooks.description: Runs tsc --noEmit and npm run lint after JS/TS source writes; runs npm run build additionally after config file changes

hooks.name: flaky-test-detector
hooks.description: Fires after test run result writes; calls /api/flaky-tests/refresh and sends a Discord alert for each newly detected flaky test

settings.description: Merge the hooks array from this file into your project's .claude/settings.json to activate all four hooks

discord.description: Discord bot integration for interactive MCP use and automated flake alerts

DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN.description: Discord bot token — required for Discord MCP and flaky-test-detector hook alerts

DISCORD_FLAKY_CHANNEL_ID.description: Discord channel ID that receives new-flake alert messages from the flaky-test-detector hook
